# scikit-learn

`scikit-learn` 适合传统机器学习任务，如分类、回归、聚类、特征工程和模型评估。

## 安装

```bash
pip install scikit-learn
```

## 基本示例

```python
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression

model = LogisticRegression()
```
